hero.recraft_prompt_if_needed: Professional clean finished drywall repair on interior wall with fresh paint, modern residential room, natural light, photorealistic, no text or signage, no people.
hero.caption_context: Prefer finished-work hero (clean wall, ceiling, or painted room) over process shots. Drywall's 'before/after' is the conversion trigger — emphasize the finished state.

gallery.context: Before (damaged drywall/water spot/hole) next to after (seamless repair + paint). Caption 'Drywall + paint — finished seamless'.
Water damage restoration in-progress or finished. Caption 'Water damage — drywall, ceiling, and paint in one trip'.
Textured ceiling repair or matched texture. Caption 'Textured ceilings — matched and hidden'.
Cabinet painting (kitchen/bathroom). Caption 'Cabinet painting — sprayed, sealed, cured'.
Interior room painted with clean trim work. Caption 'Interior painting — cut-in clean, roller even'.
David Neel or crew member working. Caption naming David if it's him.

sections.context: Atlanta or Norcross residential exteriors; Unsplash OK

notes: Drywall + paint vertical = before/after visual is THE conversion driver. Prioritize finished/fixed imagery. Water damage work photos are high-value for insurance-claim outreach angle. Two physical addresses mean likely 2x photo inventory — Bruce can pull from both Yelp listings (Atlanta 17 photos + Norcross 35 photos). Cabinet painting is the differentiator that sets this apart from dedicated drywall shops.
